exercise_requirement: Learn image-text compatibility scores, compare at least two equal-pair strategies, and test reversed-pair antisymmetry.
research_question: Can the three-class relation task be represented as an ordered compatibility score with stable pairwise differences?
hypothesis: MATCH descriptions will receive higher scores than PARTIAL_MATCH and MISMATCH, with flip consistency near antisymmetry.
random_seed_policy: primary seed 42; retained comparisons repeat seeds 42, 43, and 44
safety_notes: Do not load, inspect, score, or tune against the locked test split.
